overview: Dark roadhouse-themed employee training and certification app for Bubba's 33 restaurant staff, with Internet Identity login, roles, positions, and a position-first home screen.
features: Sign in with Internet Identity and create a staff profile
Position-first home grid with In training, Certified, and Not started status badges
Admins create, edit, reorder, and delete job positions
Admins manage users, roles, and position assignments with status
Dark patriotic roadhouse theme with Anton, Oswald, and Barlow fonts
